projects.name: NotesHive
description: Applied software engineering principles to design and build a scalable academic notes management platform focused on performance and reliability.
Worked with end users including teachers and students to gather requirements and determine feature scope for search, upload, and access workflows.
Adopted and integrated new AI-based technologies including Sentence Transformer models to deliver semantic search capabilities.
Implemented role-based access control using object-oriented design patterns, enabling secure REST API operations for multiple user types.
Sought feedback during development and applied best practices in API design to improve technical solutions and system efficiency.
Contributed to monitoring platform availability by implementing structured error handling and logging across all REST API endpoints.

projects.name: ReadBuddy: AI Video Analyzer
description: Applied engineering principles creatively to build an accessibility-focused Chrome extension that solves real-world navigation problems for visually impaired users.
Learned and adopted new engineering methods including multimodal AI models such as InstructBLIP and Pegasus within a fast-paced hackathon environment.
Collaborated with team members to determine user requirements and translate them into a working technical solution within tight time constraints.
Developed scalable REST API services using FastAPI following object-oriented software development practices.
Demonstrated time management by delivering a complete, functional product under hackathon conditions.
Proactively explored and incorporated the Google Gemini API to improve the observability and performance of video summarization features.

projects.name: Smart Emergency Assistance System
description: Applied engineering principles to solve a complex location-based emergency response problem through sound algorithmic design.
Worked with stakeholders to define requirements for a real-time emergency assistance system serving multiple user types.
Implemented distance calculation algorithms using object-oriented programming to identify the nearest emergency service station efficiently.
Automated SMS alert operations using Twilio API, contributing to system reliability and operational consistency at scale.
Sought feedback from mentor and applied best practices to improve solution accuracy and system performance.
Reviewed and adopted new tools including Folium for geospatial visualization to enhance product quality and observability.

projects.name: User-Level Firewall Framework
description: Applied engineering principles to design and implement a user-level firewall framework for monitoring network traffic and improving system efficiency.
Developed modules for process monitoring, rule-based filtering, and connection tracking using object-oriented software engineering practices.
Contributed to monitoring and operations by building an event logger and action simulator to track system health and connection activity at scale.
Proactively reviewed network security methods and incorporated new knowledge about socket monitoring to improve the reliability and observability of the framework.
Built an interactive GUI with a rule engine to enable stakeholders to manage and configure firewall rules based on operational requirements.
Collaborated with mentor to seek feedback and iteratively improve the technical solution, applying industry best practices throughout development.

experience.title: Software Engineering Project Contributor
description: Collaborated with academic mentors and peers to deliver multiple software engineering projects from requirements gathering to deployment.
Demonstrated time management and cooperative team environment skills by completing four full-stack projects concurrently across a single semester.
Consistently sought feedback from faculty mentors and applied internal best practices to improve technical solutions across all projects.
Adopted new technologies, tools, and engineering methods in each project cycle including AI models, network monitoring tools, and cloud deployment platforms.
Contributed to monitoring, operations, and system efficiency by implementing logging, error handling, and performance optimisation across projects.
Applied engineering principles to solve complex problems creatively — from emergency response algorithms to AI-powered accessibility tools.

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science (AI & Data Science)
education.institution: Graphic Era (Deemed to be University), Dehradun

profile_info.name: Nandini Aggarwal
profile_info.bio: Software engineering student passionate about building reliable, scalable software solutions. Experienced in Python, REST APIs, and machine learning integration. Strong focus on problem solving, monitoring, and delivering impactful products.
